name: infra-scanner
description: Authorized infrastructure security scanning plugin. Runs Infrastructure-as-Code misconfiguration detection (Dockerfile, Terraform, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions), CycloneDX SBOM generation, and optional network port + TLS scanning. Produces local HTML, Markdown, and JSON reports. Companion to pentest-agent for users who want infra coverage alongside web-application pentesting. Requires explicit --authorized flag.
